title: SIASIU 실제 엔진 → Foundation Common Brain 승격용 Source Package
key_finding: 실 엔진 거의 전부 foundation_status=absent. Foundation엔 계약·shadow·가드추상·LMR·classifier 1개만. 실 검색/작문/추천/메모리 로직은 미이식. 예외: answer_type_classifier.classify=migrated_real, safety_gate/external_guard=rebuilt_abstraction_only.

two_paths.mismatch_note: Foundation shadow는 경로 B를 감쌌으나 실제 사용자는 경로 A 사용 → '이식했는데 라이브 그대로'의 근본 원인

brain_orchestrator.path_notes: 라이브 /api/chat → brain.chat() 오케스트레이터. brain.py 58함수. 전부 foundation_status=absent.

components.name: app/brain.py:chat
components.role: 라이브 상담 오케스트레이터
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 오케스트레이션 골격은 일반화 가능, 호출 부품들이 SIASIU 결합
components.generalize_note: 파이프라인 골격=common, 주입 부품 분리

components.name: app/brain.py:guardrail_classify+guardrail_check
components.role: LLM 의미 분류(domain/risk)·차단(default-deny)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: domain 목록(피부/기능의학/퍼스널컬러)은 SIASIU, 분류 골격은 일반
components.generalize_note: LLM 의미분류 framework=common, domain/risk 정책=SIASIU 주입

components.name: app/brain.py:kb_search→_kb_engine
components.role: retrieval 진입(ssbrain engine 호출)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 회피필터·atom 결합
components.generalize_note: 검색 진입 골격=common, 어휘=SIASIU

components.name: app/brain.py:_system_prompt+_output_lang+_localize
components.role: composer(페르소나·그라운딩·언어 현지화)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 존댓말 절대·한국 드라마 톤·선택적 그라운딩 문구
components.generalize_note: composer 계약(LLM=표현만)=common, PERSONA/언어=SIASIU 주입

components.name: app/brain.py:_llm+_deepseek+_log_usage
components.role: LLM 라우터(task→tier→provider)·생성·사용량 로깅
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 프로바이더 라우팅은 일반
components.generalize_note: LLM Router framework=common(task 매핑만 주입)

components.name: app/brain.py:verify_output
components.role: 출력검증(internal/efficacy/avoid)·fail-closed
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 검수 골격 일반, 회피목록 SIASIU
components.generalize_note: LLM-judge 검수 framework=common(+fabrication 항목 신설), 회피=SIASIU

components.name: app/brain.py:memory_context+active_facts+recent_episodes+add_episode
components.role: 기억 주입·단기/장기
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 구조 일반, CANON 라벨 SIASIU
components.generalize_note: Memory Trust=LMR로 일부 이식됨, CANON 주입 인터페이스 필요

components.name: app/brain.py:extract+_deepseek_extract+upsert_fact+_norm_value
components.role: 사실 추출·정규화·저장(supersede)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 추출 골격 일반, CANON 타입 SIASIU
components.generalize_note: 추출/정규화 framework=common, 타입 레지스트리=SIASIU 주입

components.name: app/brain.py:CANON+SAFETY_TYPES+SINGLE
components.role: 사실타입 레지스트리(데이터)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: K-뷰티 사실타입·임신/회피 라벨
components.generalize_note: 레지스트리 *구조*=common, *내용*=SIASIU 주입

components.name: app/brain.py:avoid_list+avoid_atoms
components.role: 제품추천 권한(회피성분 하드체크)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: K-뷰티 성분 atom
components.generalize_note: 추천 권한 framework=common, atom=SIASIU

components.name: app/brain.py:recall+recall_greeting+_suggestion_chips
components.role: 재진입 인사·회상·추천칩
components.siasiu_specific_reason: 한국어 인사·도메인 칩
components.generalize_note: 회상 골격 일반, 표현=SIASIU
test_cases: 재방문 신호 있을 때만 친밀 인사

components.name: app/brain.py:recos+pitch+checkins
components.role: 추천·음성 pitch·홈 체크인
components.siasiu_specific_reason: K-뷰티 제품·음성
components.generalize_note: 추천 framework 일부 common, 제품 도메인=SIASIU

components.name: app/brain.py:_conn+init_db+DB스키마
components.role: memory.db(user/episode/memory_fact/fact_type_registry)·WAL
components.siasiu_specific_reason: SIASIU 메모리 스키마
components.generalize_note: DB 연결 패턴 common, 스키마=SIASIU

components.name: app/ssbrain/engine.py:Engine
components.role: Main hybrid search engine orchestrating BM25+vector+graph+rerank channels via RRF fusion
components.inputs: query (str), k (int, top-k results), cand (int, candidate pool size), brand (str|None, scope filter), rerank_on (bool), opts (dict, channel toggles)
components.outputs: List of dicts with doc_id, score (RRF fusion), vscore (vector component), title, doc_type, domain, brand, risk_level, text (full), graph (bool), name_match (bool)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Korean-centric CLIR (다국어 매핑, 원자 매핑), intent recognition (제품/성분 마커), graph-based ingredient→product boosting, brand scope filtering
components.generalize_note: RRF fusion generic but atom vocabulary, bridge rules, intent markers are SIASIU/COSMILE-specific. Externalize for generalization.
test_cases: test_engine_rrf: RRF doc deduplication (best rank only), multichannel summation
test_engine_search: top-k cutoff, graph rescue (atom→product), brand filtering, full text preservation
test_engine_rerank_order: head+tail rerank invariant (#6), no score mixing

components.name: app/ssbrain/engine.py:rrf
components.role: Reciprocal Rank Fusion — normalized score aggregation across channels (BM25, vector, graph)
components.inputs: channels (list of hit lists), k (int, RRF parameter, default 60)
components.outputs: dict: doc_id → float (RRF score = Σ 1/(k + rank + 1) per best rank per channel)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: RRF is standard fusion algorithm, scale-agnostic
components.generalize_note: Generic fusion primitive, reusable in any multimodal retrieval
test_cases: test_engine_rrf: within-channel dedup (best rank), multi-channel summation, empty channel handling

components.name: app/ssbrain/bridge.py:massage
components.role: Query Massage (CLIR) — multi-lingual surface expansion + semantic atom mapping
components.siasiu_specific_reason: BRIDGE hardcoded with KO↔EN↔ZH concern/ingredient atoms; cross-lingual gap filling for zh-origin products; deterministic glossary-based
components.generalize_note: Architecture (glossary→atoms+expansion) generic; externalize vocabulary/rules for generalization
test_cases: test_bridge: CJK→Latin expansion (모공→pore/毛孔), atom inference, Latin phrase cross-interference blocking, empty query safety

components.name: app/ssbrain/bm25.py:build
components.role: BM25 index construction — in-memory for seed scale
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Standard BM25 construction, agnostic to language
components.generalize_note: In-memory BM25 suitable for <1M docs; swap with FTS5/Elasticsearch at scale
test_cases: test_bm25: build (n, avgdl), search ranking, log-IDF non-negativity, empty corpus

components.name: app/ssbrain/bm25.py:search
components.role: BM25 lexical retrieval — keyword matching with IDF scoring
components.inputs: idx (BM25 index), query (str), k (int), k1 (float), b (float)
components.outputs: list of dicts: {chunk_id, doc_id, bm25 (score), retriever ('bm25')}, sorted desc, limited to k
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Standard BM25 ranking formula, language-agnostic
components.generalize_note: Reusable across domains
test_cases: test_bm25: keyword retrieval (모공→d1,d3), no-match empty result, score monotonicity

components.name: app/ssbrain/vector.py:build
components.role: Dense semantic index construction via multilingual-e5-small embeddings
components.siasiu_specific_reason: e5-small is generic multilingual; lazy load pattern avoids torch/st imports unless needed
components.generalize_note: Embedding model swappable; lazy load pattern reusable
test_cases: test_vector: embeddings shape (n, 384), cosine search, vscore>0 filtering, empty corpus

components.name: app/ssbrain/vector.py:search
components.role: Dense semantic retrieval via cosine similarity (dot product on normalized embeddings)
components.outputs: list of dicts: {chunk_id, doc_id, vscore (cosine), retriever ('vector')}, filtered by vscore>0, sorted desc
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Standard cosine similarity, model-agnostic
components.generalize_note: Reusable dense retrieval primitive
test_cases: test_vector: semantic retrieval (모공케어→d1), vscore>0 filtering, empty corpus, no-overlap zero-out

components.name: app/ssbrain/graph.py:load
components.role: Load relationship graph from SQLite edges table into in-memory adjacency dict
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Graph semantics (concern/ingredient atoms, in_product/suits/safe_for relations) are COSMILE-specific
components.generalize_note: Adjacency dict pattern reusable; externalize edge semantics for generalization
test_cases: test_graph: related() set union, immutability (no side effects)

components.name: app/ssbrain/graph.py:related
components.role: Retrieve products related to query atoms via graph edges
components.outputs: set of related doc_ids (union of all atom→product edges)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Atom vocabulary (concern:pore, ing:centella) SIASIU-specific
components.generalize_note: Graph traversal logic reusable; externalize atom semantics
test_cases: test_graph: single/multi-atom retrieval, missing atoms → empty, empty atom set → empty, immutability

components.name: app/ssbrain/rerank.py:rerank
components.role: Conditional cross-encoder reranking of top-n hits; head+tail pattern preserves tail order (#6 invariant)
components.inputs: query (str), hits (list of dicts with 'text'), top_n (int)
components.outputs: list: head (top_n reranked desc) + tail (remaining, original order), head entries get 'rerank' field
components.siasiu_specific_reason: bge-reranker is generic; head+tail invariant (#6) is SIASIU design (avoid negative rerank scores dominating RRF tail)
components.generalize_note: Cross-encoder reranking pattern reusable; head+tail order preservation (#6) is key invariant
test_cases: test_rerank_unit: head reranking (MATCH document rises), tail passthrough (original order), rerank score injection (head only), empty input

components.name: app/ssbrain/text.py:tokens
components.role: Multilingual tokenizer — Latin words + CJK bigram
components.outputs: list of tokens: Latin alnum tokens (lowercased) + CJK bigram or single-char tokens
components.siasiu_specific_reason: CJK bigram (captures 2-char words 진정, 모공) reflects Korean hairball; bigram+Latin mix reflects multilingual strategy
components.generalize_note: Bigram for CJK reusable across Korean/Chinese; Latin alnum pattern generic
test_cases: test_text: CJK bigram (진정모공→[진정,정모,모공]), Latin word extraction, 1-char CJK passthrough

components.name: app/ssbrain/text.py:surface_match
components.role: Deterministic surface form matching — Latin phrase boundary-aware, CJK continuous substring
components.outputs: bool: term normalized surface appears in query with proper boundaries
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Latin boundary logic (word-boundary anchors, comma/period barriers) blocks cross-lingual false matches; CJK substring has known boundary limitation (requires jieba-style segmentation for fix), documented as TODO, low impact
components.generalize_note: Latin boundary matching reusable; CJK limitation known and acceptable. Blocks most false positives via comma/period barriers.
test_cases: test_text: Latin boundary (tea-tree matches 'tea tree' but not 'green tea, tree house'), CJK substring matching, empty term safety

components.name: app/ssbrain/ingest.py:parse_product
components.role: Parse product .md frontmatter + body → doc/chunks/edges/product_ingredients dicts (legacy & PRISM)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Product schema (doc_type=product, brand, concern_tags, ingredients, atoms) and COSMILE/PRISM structures (core.yaml, ingredients.yaml, locales/) are SIASIU-specific; clean-not-compress preservation (no truncate) reflects grounding requirement
components.generalize_note: Parsing pattern (frontmatter+body→chunks+edges) reusable; externalize schema/vocabulary (atom definitions, edge types)
test_cases: test_ingest_product: frontmatter parsing, chunk generation (main+prose), concentration parsing (49%→49.0, 适量→None), edge creation, full text preservation, idempotence, remove symmetry

components.name: app/ssbrain/ingest.py:ingest_file
components.role: Insert/upsert parsed product into SQLite (idempotent: recreates chunks/edges/product_ingredients on reingest)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Schema (documents.doc_type=product, chunks, edges, product_ingredients) SIASIU-specific; rebuild strategy (DELETE old chunks/edges on reingest) prevents stale data
components.generalize_note: Idempotent upsert pattern reusable; note DELETE edges WHERE dst=product_id is critical for consistency
test_cases: test_ingest_product: idempotence (reingest same counts), remove_product symmetry (delete all refs)

components.name: app/ssbrain/ingest.py:ingest_knowledge_file
components.role: Parse knowledge .md → doc/chunks (ingredient card if atom present); ingredient table index for name-based exact match
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Ingredient card schema (atom slug as stable doc_id, name/aliases/inci/category as metadata chunks) is COSMILE-specific; name indexing enables exact-match boost in engine.search (NAME_BOOST)
components.generalize_note: Chunk generation from prose reusable (~1500 char semantic chunks); ingredient indexing pattern reusable
test_cases: test_ingest_knowledge_rebuild: file filtering (_prefix, README skip), rebuild invariant (single path = single doc), doc_id change handling

components.name: app/ssbrain/ingest.py:ingest_knowledge_dir
components.role: Recursively ingest knowledge diet_dir .md files; rebuild (default) clears old knowledge docs to prevent orphans
components.siasiu_specific_reason: rebuild=True clears all knowledge docs (not products) before reingest to handle doc_id=hash(path+content) changes; preserves products (doc_type filter)
components.generalize_note: Batch ingest + rebuild pattern reusable; type-specific selective clear is domain-specific
test_cases: test_ingest_knowledge_rebuild: idempotence (no orphans), doc_id migration, product preservation

components.name: app/ssbrain/ingest.py:remove_product
components.role: Delete product and all its refs symmetrically (documents/chunks/edges/product_ingredients)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Symmetric delete pattern generic
components.generalize_note: Reusable delete symmetry pattern

components.name: app/ssbrain/schema.py:connect
components.role: SQLite connection + schema initialization (DDL, WAL mode, version seeding)
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Schema (documents.doc_type, ingredients, product_ingredients, edges, search_logs, think_logs) integrates search + safety + logging for SIASIU grounding
components.generalize_note: Schema-first initialization (idempotent DDL, IF NOT EXISTS) reusable pattern
test_cases: test_schema: all tables present, dead chunks_fts removed (BM25 in-memory replaces), schema_version seeded, idempotence, row_factory=Row

search_stack.path_notes: All ssbrain components are in /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/ssbrain/ (engine.py, bridge.py, bm25.py, vector.py, graph.py, rerank.py, text.py, ingest.py, schema.py, answer.py, demo.py). No actual search algorithms migrated to /home/leo/Project/FOUNDATION/foundation/_core/ (only foundation_retrieval_hit_contract.py exists as contract DTO, foundation_brain_retrieval_distribution_sampler.py as test fixture sampler). Test suite in /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/tests/test_ssbrain.py (results-driven, deterministic fakes for vector/rerank). Foundation integration via foundation_core_client.py and foundation_trace_bridge.py (in-process, no network, no write, phase 5 status).

components.name: ssbrain/answer.py:answer()
components.role: Grounded answer generation pipeline — retrieval + LLM draft + multi-gate safety/evidence/external
components.inputs: Engine, query:str, k:int=4, rerank_on:bool=False, audience:str='customer', source_layer:str='learned'
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Core SIASIU brain answer generation pipeline calling live LLM router + grounding logic specific to skin/health domain safety constraints
components.generalize_note: answer() is high-level orchestrator; could be generalized by extracting gate/evidence/external functions into reusable foundation contracts/policies. Currently tightly coupled to ssbrain engine.search() and brain._llm routing.

components.name: ssbrain/answer.py:safety_gate()
components.role: Pre-response safety gate — detect forbidden phrases (safety_words + extra cosmetic/medical claims) + pregnancy/safety assertion co-occurrence + verify_output LLM check
components.siasiu_specific_reason: _EXTRA_FORBIDDEN rule set (청소년/의료대체/질환완화/부작용 단정) is domain-specific; preg/lact + safe_assert co-occurrence is cosmetic/medical specific; gate pattern is generalizable
components.generalize_note: Abstract as: rule_based_gate(text, forbidden_list) + optional_llm_verify(text, key_available). Foundation trust_core has similar but different rule content.

components.name: app/answer_provenance.py:select_phrase()
components.role: Emit user-facing provenance phrase based on answer_mode + source_layer pair; guards against forbidden system-exposure phrases
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Phrase set is Korean-language domain-specific (skin/cosmetic/health context)
components.generalize_note: Abstract as phrase_selector(mode, layer) with pluggable phrase table. Table content is domain/language specific.

components.name: app/answer_provenance.py:pick_opener()
components.role: Select conditional opener phrase (deterministic seed-based) based on situation to avoid mechanical repetition in UX v1.1
components.siasiu_specific_reason: UX pattern (conditional openers, seed-based determinism) and phrase inventory are SIASIU-specific
components.generalize_note: Deterministic opener selection via seed_hash is reusable pattern. Phrase table and situation taxonomy are domain-specific.

components.name: app/answer_provenance.py:build_trace()
components.role: Construct internal trace dict for audit/internal use; NOT exposed to user
components.inputs: source_layer:str, evidence_score:float|None, source_urls:list=None, reviewed_by:str=None, last_verified_at:str=None, answer_mode:str=None, claim_type:str=None
components.outputs: dict{source_layer, evidence_score, source_urls, reviewed_by, last_verified_at, answer_mode, claim_type}
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Generic audit trace schema. Could be lifted to Foundation common layer.
components.generalize_note: Trivial key-value wrapper. Should move to foundation.common as reusable trace contract.

components.name: app/answer_provenance.py:is_forbidden()
components.role: Scan text for FORBIDDEN_PHRASES that expose internal system details
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Forbidden list is SIASIU-specific system-exposure phrases (저장된 검증 지식, 내 데이터베이스, etc.)
components.generalize_note: Generic pattern: check_violations(text, rule_list). Rule list is context-specific.

components.name: app/answer_provenance.py:compose()
components.role: Package answer_mode + source_layer into (user_text with opener, trace) dict
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Composition logic is generic; phrase + trace are SIASIU-specific
components.generalize_note: High-level convenience; not used in answer.py main path. Could be generalized or deprecated.

components.name: app/disclosure_policy.py:external_guard()
components.role: Final gate before external (customer/partner/investor) exposure — detect never_disclose sensitivity levels
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Gate pattern is generic. never_disclose categories (scoring_formula, reranker_routing, safety_gate_rule_detail, api_key_secret, etc.) are SIASIU-specific internal details.
components.generalize_note: Generic gate pattern: classify_sensitivity(text) → apply_audience_policy(sensitivity, audience). Categories and patterns are context-specific.

components.name: app/disclosure_policy.py:classify_sensitivity()
components.role: Scan text for never_disclose patterns (scoring_formula, reranker_routing, safety_gate_rule, api_key_secret, etc.) and return max sensitivity level
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Pattern set (scoring_formula, reranker_routing, safety_gate_rule_detail, learned_promotion_internals, model_orchestration_rules) is SIASIU internal implementation detail
components.generalize_note: Pattern-based classifier is generic; patterns are context-specific to SIASIU internal/external contracts.

components.name: app/disclosure_policy.py:redact()
components.role: Redact (replace with [비공개]) never_disclose patterns above audience clearance level
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Redaction strategy and pattern set are SIASIU-specific
components.generalize_note: Generic pattern: for_each_category if_above_audience_level redact_patterns(category). Patterns and levels are context-specific.

components.name: app/evidence_mode.py:evidence_answer_mode()
components.role: Determine conservative answer_mode based on evidence score + claim_type + tier1 + hit count. Knowledge Brain evidence policy (Response Brain not referenced).
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Evidence scoring logic (coarse_score, claim_type mapping) and HIGH_RISK override are SIASIU-specific. answer_mode enum is generic.
components.generalize_note: Extract: confidence_score(hits) → answer_mode_policy(score, claim_type, tier1) → mode. Mode ranking and safety caps are reusable.

components.name: app/evidence_mode.py:cap_mode()
components.role: Enforce conservative ceiling on answer_mode — lower rank if exceeds
components.siasiu_specific_reason: Generic mode capping logic. Mode enum is application-specific.
components.generalize_note: Trivial rank comparison. Should be inlined or moved to foundation.common.

components.name: app/answer_type_classifier.py:classify()
components.role: Rule-based answer_type classification for risk flagging + shadow trace. NO user_text modification.
components.siasiu_specific_reason: HIGH_RISK_TYPES and keyword rules are SIASIU/skin-health domain specific (pregnancy, medical_boundary, adverse_reaction, internal_algorithm). Rule-based pattern is generic.
components.generalize_note: Classification pattern (keyword→type→high_risk) is reusable; rule table is domain-specific. Stays in Foundation as shared reference.

answer_face.path_notes:
ANSWER.PY LAYER INVENTORY v1 (Slice 3: ssbrain/answer.py + supporting modules)

LIVE BRAIN ANSWER PIPELINE (grounded generation):
  answer.py (ssbrain/) is the primary answer generation interface, used in live demo (ssbrain/demo.py) and tests (tests/test_ssbrain.py). Returns dict{reply(user-facing), trace(internal-only), grounded:bool, hits}.

MODULE SEPARATION:
  answer.py (orchestrator) depends on 4 Trust Core submodules:
    - answer_provenance.py: provenance phrases (select_phrase, pick_opener) + trace building (build_trace) + forbidden phrase checks
    - disclosure_policy.py: external exposure gate (external_guard, classify_sensitivity, redact) for customer/partner/investor audiences
    - evidence_mode.py: Knowledge Brain answer_mode determination (evidence_answer_mode, cap_mode) based on hit score/claim type/tier1
    - answer_type_classifier.py: question type classification for shadow trace only (classify), NO behavior change
    - Also uses: brain._llm (live LLM router), safety_words.violations (deterministic forbidden phrase list)

FOUNDATION WRAPPING & SHADOW:
  Foundation's foundation_brain_answer_adapter.py wraps answer() WITHOUT modifying behavior:
    - shadow_for_request() generates Foundation shadow trace from answer.py inputs (query, hits, answer_type, high_risk) WITHOUT calling answer.py
    - answer_py_fingerprint() verifies answer.py source unchanged (d7f579443f8a110a)
    - Adapter imports only contracts (foundation_brain_contracts), not answer.py source
    - Test test_siasiu_answer_behavior_unchanged.py verifies fingerprint stable + shadow identity (siasiu_output unchanged)

FOUNDATION COUNTERPARTS:
  - answer_type_classifier.py: migrated_real (Foundation has identical copy at foundation/_core/answer_type_classifier.py)
  - answer_provenance.py, disclosure_policy.py, evidence_mode.py: absent in Foundation (SIASIU-only or not yet lifted)
  - safety_gate() + _guard_external() + _situation(): rebuilt_abstraction_only (Foundation trust_core has different implementations)

DIFFERENCE VS LIVE BRAIN.CHAT:
  answer() is a separate, explicit grounded answer pipeline (introduced 2026-06-22). It differs from brain.chat (if it exists) by:
    - Mandatory retrieval-based grounding (engine.search() -> cannot_determine if no hits, pre-gate LLM)
    - Multi-stage gating: safety_gate(content) -> evidence_mode (conservative mode) -> answer_type shadow -> external_guard (disclosure policy)
    - Explicit audience parameter (customer|partner|investor) controlling redaction level
    - Trace separation (internal trace never exposed to user_text)
    - answer_type_classifier shadow (trace-only, no behavior change)
  answer.py is NOT integrated into live brain.chat; it's a companion face for grounded answers.

KEY ARCHITECTURAL POINTS:
  1. GROUNDING = retrieval pre-gate (no LLM if no hits) + system prompt forcing "근거 없으면 모름"
  2. SAFETY = safety_gate (rule+verify) + evidence_mode (conservative mode) + external_guard (disclosure redact)
  3. SHADOW = answer_type_classifier.classify() records type/high_risk in trace only; no user_text change
  4. TRACE INTERNAL = source_layer/evidence_score/answer_mode/claim_type never exposed (separate from reply)
  5. OPENER DETERMINISTIC = seed-based (no random) to ensure reproducibility + variety via conditional rules

TEST COVERAGE:
  - test_ssbrain.py::test_answer: core pipeline (grounded/cannot_determine, LLM call branches)
  - test_answer_pipeline_guard.py: comprehensive gates (safety, scoring redact, routing redact, high_risk override, UX v1.1 conditions)
  - test_siasiu_answer_behavior_unchanged.py: fingerprint + shadow identity verification
  - test_answer_py_shadow_no_behavior_change.py: adapter isolation (no patch, no sys.modules mutation)

FILE PATHS:
  /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/ssbrain/answer.py (main interface)
  /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/answer_provenance.py (phrases, trace, opener)
  /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/disclosure_policy.py (external gate, redact)
  /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/evidence_mode.py (Knowledge Brain mode determination)
  /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/answer_type_classifier.py (shadow classification)
  /home/leo/Project/SIASIU/app/safety_words.py (forbidden phrase list, used by safety_gate)
  /home/leo/Project/FOUNDATION/foundation/_core/answer_type_classifier.py (Foundation mirror)
  /home/leo/Project/FOUNDATION/foundation/_core/foundation_brain_answer_adapter.py (wrapper adapter)"

products_memory.path_notes: CRITICAL IMPLEMENTATION LOCATIONS FOR PRODUCT RECOMMENDATION PERMISSION (회피성분 회피/avoid 배제): (1) avoid_atoms(user_id) [brain.py 138-148] normalizes user's avoided ingredients to deterministic atoms via ssbrain.bridge.massage(). (2) _product_atoms(p) [brain.py 985-998] extracts product's avoid_match + ingredients, normalizes to atoms. (3) _pitch_variant(user_id, p) [brain.py 1000-1005] HARD CHECK: avoid_atoms(user_id) & _product_atoms(p) set intersection - conflict detection. Returns 'avoid' variant when non-empty. (4) pitch(user_id, product_id) [brain.py 1058-1065] calls _pitch_variant, generates warm avoid-text when conflict detected (not hard rejection). (5) kb_search(query, user_id) [brain.py 557-585] filters avoid_docs using graph.related() BEFORE ranking (lines 566-578). (6) verify_output(reply, avoid_list) [brain.py 748-767] LLM re-checks output doesn't recommend avoided ingredients (double gate, fail-closed). Foundation modules (foundation_purchase_decision_guard.py, safety_guard_layer.py, do_not_buy_guard.py, customer_decision_memory.py) are wrappers re-exporting actual implementation from app/ files - only abstract policy definitions in foundation/_core (stub-only or absent), NOT actual SIASIU logic. Memory schema (user/episode/memory_fact/fact_type_registry) defined in init_db() lines 75-106. CANON fact types (line 35-47), SAFETY_TYPES (line 53), SINGLE (line 48) are hardcoded configuration, not migrated to foundation/_core.

Retrieval Fusion: engine.search top-k·graph 구제·brand 필터·full text 보존
Memory Trust: SAFETY_TYPES 즉시 active·decay 없음·SINGLE supersede·cross-customer 격리·삭제 재등장 0
Composer: LLM 교체해도 판단 불변(표현만)·존댓말 유지(주입 언어별)

conclusion: 승격할 '공통 두뇌'=검색융합·그라운딩·가드레일·출력검증·evidence·composer 계약·LLM라우터의 framework이고 현재 Foundation에 거의 absent. bridge/atom/CANON/SEED_KB/PERSONA/domain은 SIASIU 전용이라 복사 말고 주입형 분리. framework=foundation-control, 어휘/정책=SIASIU repo-local.
